title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 92.
content:
There was an Old Man, who said, "Well!
    Will NOBODY answer this bell?
    I have pulled day and night,
    Till my hair has grown white,
    But nobody answers this bell!"
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 92."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
